description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical pot containing two large, vibrant red roses with lush green leaves and stems. The pot is smooth, plain, and appears to be made of a light gray material, likely plastic or ceramic, with no visible decorative elements. The roses are in full bloom, with layered petals and realistic foliage, giving the arrangement a fresh and lively appearance. The stems and leaves are detailed, with some leaves extending outward and downward, adding to the natural look. The overall composition is elegant and simple, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. There are no visible plant labels or tags attached to the pot or the plant.
description: A tall, plain gray pot holds two blooming red roses with lush green leaves, creating a vibrant and elegant display. The arrangement is simple and realistic, with no visible decorations or labels.
description_view_0: Two red roses in full bloom are visible, with the pot and most leaves clearly shown from the front.
description_view_1: The roses are seen more from the side, with both blooms facing forward and the leaves partially obscuring the pot.
description_view_2: One rose is more prominent, angled toward the viewer, while the other is partially behind, with the pot and leaves visible.
description_view_3: Both roses are facing forward, with the larger bloom in the center and leaves extending outward, giving a symmetrical appearance.
